review_comment: Is there a reason we can't mock away the entire client to avoid having to cnonfigure `aioclient` requests here? Imo it's cleaner if we just mock the methods of the client and leave the request mocking to the lib tests

We can. It's just much easier and cleaner to mock the responses instead of constructing the dataclasses manually for all the requests.
I see what you mean, but would prefer to leave it like this.
